base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of physical_hit_flash_yellow — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1986 dragon quest. physical attack impact. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 5-frame yellow burst — physical attack impact; small dot → expanding star → larger X-burst → receding flash → fade. Plays over enemy sprite on successful hit
